root_cause_summary: Live Stripe price IDs in service_plans/stripe-prices.ts sent to Stripe API with test-mode key. Test mode cannot resolve live price IDs. Marketplace add-ons succeed because they use price_data (inline amounts), bypassing all price ID lookups.

environments.name: local_dev
environments.note: APP_BASE_URL points to production — Stripe redirects go to live site during local dev. Consider changing to localhost for local testing.

environments.name: netlify_production
environments.stripe_secret_key_mode: UNVERIFIED — must be sk_live_... in Netlify dashboard
environments.stripe_publishable_key_mode: UNVERIFIED — must be pk_live_... in Netlify dashboard
environments.webhook_secret_mode: UNVERIFIED — must be live webhook signing secret
environments.status: ACTION_REQUIRED — verify all three Stripe env vars in Netlify dashboard
action_items: Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY = sk_live_... in Netlify Site Settings > Environment Variables
Set VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY = pk_live_... in Netlify Site Settings > Environment Variables
Set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET = whsec_live_... from Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks

environments.name: netlify_deploy_preview
environments.stripe_secret_key_mode: INHERITS PRODUCTION — should be overridden to test in Netlify context settings
environments.allowed_cards: Stripe test cards (after context override applied)
environments.status: ACTION_REQUIRED — add Netlify context override for Deploy Previews
action_items: In Netlify dashboard: add context override for 'Deploy previews'
Override STRIPE_SECRET_KEY = sk_test_... for deploy previews
Override VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY = pk_test_... for deploy previews
Override STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET = test webhook signing secret for deploy previews

unused_variables.LIVE_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: Present in .env but NEVER read by any server route — misleading naming
unused_variables.LIVE_VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY: Present in .env but NEVER read by frontend build — misleading naming

key_mode_resolution.warning: LIVE_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is NOT the same as STRIPE_SECRET_KEY. Storing live keys with a different variable name does NOT activate live mode. To use live mode, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY must be set to the live key value.

price_id_mode_audit.stripe_prices_ts_static_map: Contains 49 live price IDs — all created with live Stripe keys
price_id_mode_audit.compatibility_with_test_mode: INCOMPATIBLE — live price IDs cannot be used via sk_test key
price_id_mode_audit.account_segment: 0zUTKY2M9t confirms these belong to the live Stripe account

checkout_flows.name: New recurring subscription checkout
checkout_flows.price_source: findStripePriceAsync → service_plans or stripe-prices.ts static map
checkout_flows.test_mode_status: FAILS — live price ID rejected by test API key
checkout_flows.live_mode_status: WORKS — live price ID accepted by live API key

checkout_flows.name: Marketplace add-on checkout (hosted)
checkout_flows.price_source: price_data with unit_amount from cart items — no Stripe price ID lookup
checkout_flows.test_mode_status: WORKS — no price ID lookup, test cards accepted
checkout_flows.live_mode_status: WORKS — no price ID lookup, real cards accepted
checkout_flows.note: This is why add-ons succeed while subscription flows fail — price_data bypasses price ID mode constraint

checkout_flows.name: Marketplace PaymentIntent (in-app)
checkout_flows.price_source: Direct amount from cart totals — no Stripe price ID
checkout_flows.test_mode_status: WORKS — test cards accepted via Stripe Elements
checkout_flows.live_mode_status: WORKS — real cards accepted via Stripe Elements
checkout_flows.note: This is the flow that succeeded with test card. Mode-agnostic because it uses raw amounts.

subscription_flows.name: Plan change
subscription_flows.price_source: findStripePriceAsync — queries service_plans, falls back to stripe-prices.ts static map
subscription_flows.failure_path: Test key + live price ID → Stripe 404 'No such price' → generic 500 to client
subscription_flows.live_mode_status: WORKS — requires live customer + live price ID

subscription_flows.name: Cadence change
subscription_flows.test_mode_status: FAILS — same root cause as plan change

webhook_flows.mode_requirement: Webhook secret must match mode of Stripe endpoint (test secret for test events, live secret for live events)
webhook_flows.risk_if_secret_mismatch: All events rejected with 400 Webhook Error — no data written to Supabase
Subscription renewals not recorded — customers lose service history
In-app marketplace orders stuck in 'pending' status
Refunds not recorded in DB — financial records out of sync
Subscription status changes not reflected in app

validation_checklist.how_to_verify: Netlify → Site Settings → Environment Variables → STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
Netlify → Site Settings → Environment Variables → VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY

validation_checklist.check: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in Netlify production = live webhook signing secret
validation_checklist.how_to_verify: Netlify → Site Settings → Environment Variables → STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; compare with Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → your endpoint → Signing secret

validation_checklist.check: Live Stripe webhook endpoint registered for nomoremosquitoes.us/api/webhooks/stripe
validation_checklist.how_to_verify: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → verify endpoint exists in Live mode

validation_checklist.how_to_test: Attempt plan change in /dashboard/billing with a real Stripe customer on production

validation_checklist.check: After live payment: webhook event appears in Netlify function logs as '✓ Signature verified'
validation_checklist.how_to_test: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → view recent events → verify 200 responses

validation_checklist.check: Deploy previews use test keys (not live keys)
validation_checklist.status: ACTION REQUIRED — set context override in Netlify
validation_checklist.how_to_verify: Netlify → Site Settings → Environment Variables → add 'Deploy previews' scope with test key values

validation_checklist.check: Local dev uses test keys only
validation_checklist.how_to_verify: cat .env | grep STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (should start with sk_test_)

validation_checklist.check: LIVE_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is documented as reference-only (not active)
validation_checklist.how_to_verify: Server code only reads STRIPE_SECRET_KEY — LIVE_STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is never consumed

known_secondary_issues.risk: PGRST116 if duplicate profile rows — same bug that was fixed in billingStripe.ts
known_secondary_issues.fix: Change .single() to .limit(1) in getOrCreateStripeCustomer in marketplaceStripe.ts
known_secondary_issues.scope: outside this audit — file it as a separate fix

known_secondary_issues.issue: PaymentDialog.tsx creates a duplicate stripePromise via loadStripe
known_secondary_issues.risk: Two Stripe.js instances loaded — minor performance overhead
known_secondary_issues.fix: Import stripePromise from App.tsx or a shared lib instead of calling loadStripe again

known_secondary_issues.risk: Stripe redirect URLs point to production during local dev testing
known_secondary_issues.fix: Change to http://localhost:8080 (or local dev port) for local testing only
